title: Faculty of Medicine NP Campus

Faculty of Medicine NP Campus

Related Faculties

Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine NP Campus is located in the very center of Ümraniye, one of the largest districts on the Anatolian side of Istanbul.

Located within the borders of Saray Neighborhood, NP Campus provides an important convenience in transportation with its location within walking distance to Üsküdar-Çekmeköy Metro.

Address

You can access the Faculty of Medicine web page at
